record.title: rekod

guide.title: Pwony ma ki telo
guide.subtitle: Wek lapwony ni oter in i kin gin ma ki coyo ni, ki i acaki nio wa i lok ma ki waco.
guide.unavailable: Dul ma ki nyutu ni pe tye i kom jami ma ki keto i cim ni.
guide.select_project_device: Yer yub ki gin ma ibi keto iye jami me coyo rwom ki kany.
guide.no_record_step: Tyelo tyelo me yube — pi miite ni ki coc.
guide.complete_body: I mako jami weny ma tye i coc ni. Dok cen i dul ma ki lwongo ni Audio tab me yub ni ki iyero jami ma in imaro.

best2min.hint: Tiimo teko ki rwom me nyamo lok i kom gin ni weny me nongo kare ma tek loyo me dakika 2 — ki in pwod itwero loko rwom ne ki cingi ingee.
best2min.chart_caption: wel ma ki nongo pi wang dirica acel acel
best2min.unavailable: Kwedo ngec maber loyo pi dakika 2 pe tye i kom jami ni.

record.takes_empty: Pe tye gin mo ma ki mako i yub man.
record.ws_disconnected: Medo rwate ki rwom me mita...
record.select_project_first: Yer yub ma ibi cako kwede.
record.select_device_first: Yer gin ma ibi keto iye jami.

project.back_to_library: Dok cen i ot ma ki gwoko iye buk

stems.title: wer ki gita
stems.empty: Gin ma ki kwanyo ni pwod pe ki poko. Rub apoka poka me winyo dwan ki gita ma pat pat.

import.subtitle: Kel yub ma dong tye i disk i ot ma ki gwoko iye buk.

step1.title: Nong folda
step1.description: Nyut kama ki gwoko iye jami ni ki yub ni ki jami ma ki lubo.
step1.ffmpeg_warning: FFmpeg pe ki nongo — gin ma mite me loko ki bi kato woko.

step2.title: Nen jami ni
step2.description: Nen nying, rwom, ki ngo ma ki bi kelo ma pwod pi ki moko.

step3.done_title: Kelo jami ki i lobo mukene dong otum
step3.done_description: Yub ma piny kany ki yubu gi i ot ma ki gwoko iye buk ni.

templates.title: Kit ma ki yubu kwede
templates.subtitle: Kit me tic ki jami ma ki lwongo ni prompt templates ki meta-tags pi Suno.

tabs.prompts: Nyut kit ma ki yubu kwede

editor.title_edit: Lok kit ma ki yubu kwede
editor.name_placeholder: e.g. wer ma ki lwongo ni Acoustic ballad
editor.template_hint: Ket lanyut kama gin acel acel tye iye ki nyinge ma ki keto i dul ma ki lwongo ni double curly braces — me labolle, gin ma ki lwongo ni "genre" doko genre ma ki keto i dul aryo me yabo ki aryo me agiki.
editor.variable_options: Jami ma ki yero (ki poko ki coc)
editor.save: Gwok gin ma ki nyutu ni

metatags.title: Meta-tags
metatags.subtitle: Kit ma ki yubu kwede ki kit ma ki yubu kwede Suno ngeyo lok ma tye i kin wer.

tier_legend.1: rwom me acel — ma ki coyo piny ki ma rwate
tier_legend.3: Dul me 3 — adwogi ma pat pat
tier_legend.4: Dul me 4 — yat ma pe ki tiyo kwede, ma pe ki moko

metatags.delete_confirm_title: Kwanyo gin ma ki lwongo ni " {{tag}} "?
metatags.empty: Pe tye meta-tags ma ki yubu piri keni.

settings.title: Kit ma ki keto kwede
settings.subtitle: Ngec ma mako yub, leb, ki gin ma ki maro.

capability.separate: poko kin jami ma oa ki iye

settings.gpu_none: Pe ki nongo ngat mo ma miyo GPU
settings.defaults_title: Cwalo jami ma ki keto con
settings.lufs_target_hint: Ki tiiyo kwede ma calo gin ma ki cako kwede ka ki cwalo jami woko. Suno's default tye i -14 LUFS.
settings.saved: Jami ma ki maro ki gwoko

guide.title: Lagony me mako wer pa Suno
guide.subtitle: Kit me mako dwan ki gita ma kelo adwogi maber.
guide.intro: Suno tiyo maber loyo ki jami maleng, ma pe ki ngeyo. Labol man kwako yub, rwom me yub, ki coc me mako pi dakika 3-5.

prep.title: Yubbe
prep.body: Co i ot ma ki yubu maber onyo ma tye ki jami ma mwonya madwong (katen, bongo, bongi i ot ma ki gwoko iye jami). Neko mac ki gin mo kiken ma tye ka koko. Med dwani pi dakika 5 ma pwod pi i mako.

levels.title: rwom: -12 onyo -6 dBFS
levels.body: Tem pi rwom ma malo ma tye i kin -12 ki -6 dBFS i kom mita. I te rwom meno, koko ma tye angec bedo ma nen maber; malo ne, peko me turo jami mede. Tii ki mita ma tye i pot karatac me rekod me keto gin ma ibi nongo ma pwod pi icako.

distance.title: Bor pa Mic: 15-30 cm
distance.body: Bed 15 onyo 30 cm ki i dwan. Cok loyo meno medo lok ma ki lwongo ni plosives ki proximity effect; ka mabor nongo tye ka winyo dwan malongo ki koko.

script.title: mako lok ma ki coyo
script.vowels: Dwon ma ki mako — a, e, i, o, u
script.scales: Lapim ma yot, malo ki piny
script.excerpt: wer ma ki kwanyo (8 onyo 16 bars)
script.dynamics: Lok: cako mot, gik ki dwan malongo
script.spoken_phrase: Lok acel ma kiloko, wek Suno oniang dwani

expectations.title: Gin ma Suno tye ka kuro
expectations.body: WAV, 48 kHz, mono, dry (pe ki winyo dwan onyo adwogi), 3 onyo 5 dakika me nyutu. Dakika 2 ma ki kwanyo maleng, ma nyutu jami maber pol kare kelo adwogi maber loyo.

suno_voice_full.name: Coc me wer pi Suno
suno_voice_full.desc: 5 dakika ma ki telo: yub, dwan, rwom, dul wer aryo, kit ma gi loko kwede, ki lok ma ki waco.

step.warmup_inst: Bed agonya ki koko, lok ma ki lwongo ni lip trills (brrr), ki lok ma mwol pi dakika acel. Pe mitte ni i rekod — tye me kweyo cwinyi ma peya i wer.
step.vowels_inst: Mak dwan acel acel — a, e, i, o, u — pi ceken 3 onyo 4 i dwan ma rwate, ki dwan ma rwate. Man konyo Suno me nongo dwan maber me dwani.
step.scales_inst: Wer wer ma yot malo ki piny, i kom "la" onyo "na". Pe miite ni obed maber — yub ne tye me nyutu rwom me dwan ni.
step.section: wer ma ki kwanyo — dul me acel
step.section_inst: Wer 8 onyo 16 me wer ni, ki gin ma imito nyutu. Ket lok ma ki ngeyo maber ki bedo tye ma loyo jami ma ki tiyo kwede maber.
step.section2: wer ma ki kwanyo — dul me 2
step.section2_inst: Wer wer mukene 8 onyo 16 — maber loyo wer ma ki lwongo ni chorus onyo dul ma pat ki ma okato ni. Jami mapol ma pat pat konyo latin kwan ni me pwonyo dwani.
step.dynamics_inst: Wer lok acel-lu kun icako ki dwan malongo ki gik ki dwan malongo, labongo diyo dogi. Man nyutu Suno kit ma dwani loko kwede.
step.spoken_inst: Lok — pi i wer — lok ma tidi, ma rwate, ma calo in itye ka lok. Man konyo Suno me ngeyo dwani kikome.

stages.highpass: Gin ma ki lwongo ni high-pass filter
stages.compressor: Gin ma ki lwongo ni Compressor
stages.separate: poko kin jami ma oa ki iye

tier.4: Yat ma pe ki tic kwede

metatags.prechorus: Ma pwod peya ki goyo wer

errors.device_not_found: Gin ma ki tiyo kwede me winyo dwan pe ki nongo.

errors.ffmpeg_missing: FFmpeg pe ki keto — ket ne me loko gin ni.
errors.disk_full: Pe tye kabedo ma oromo i disk.
errors.permission_denied: Ki kwero twero pi yoo ma kimiyo ni.
errors.import_path_not_found: Yo me kelo jami pe ki nongo.
errors.job_cancelled: Ki juku tic me tic kwede.
errors.process_failed: Pe ki twero tic ki gin ma ki kwanyo ni.
